description: Animates scaling a 3D shape by a scale factor. Can scale around the origin or a specified center point. Supports both g3d mode (creates a new scaled shape with animation) and s3d mode (directly mutates the Three.js object scale).
utility: Scale 3D shapes by a factor with optional center point.

arguments.name: factor
arguments.description: The scale factor (> 0). Values > 1 enlarge, < 1 shrink

arguments.name: center
arguments.description: Center point for scaling. If omitted, scales around origin (0, 0, 0)

alternates.syntax: scale3d(G, shape, factor, cx, cy, cz)
alternates.description: Scale shape around a specified center point with three coordinates
Scale shape around a point3d expression as center

alternates.syntax: scale3d(S, shape, factor) or scale3d(S, shape, factor, cx, cy, cz)

examples.scenario: Halve the size around a specific center

examples.expression: S = s3d(at(4,20), 10, 10); g = group(); scale3d(S, g, 2)
